releaseNotes:
• Optimized backend settings for Android and Desktop (further reduces RAM, CPU, and GPU usage across all platforms).
• Improved rail grinding system.
• Rail switching is now implemented.
• Rail boost pads are now implemented.
• Skydiving areas.
• Improved dash ramps.
• 2.5D areas (both Boost/Classic style and Avatar-style sections).
• Destructible objects (currently just a metal crate).
